---
title: "About"
---

## About this project

_Short description of the project's motivation and what the site contains. Fill in later._

## Author

- **Name:** _TBD_
- **Course:** JSC370 – Data Science II (Winter 2026)
- **Institution:** University of Toronto

## Data sources

- _TBD — dataset name, provider, URL, access date._
- _TBD — API docs (if scraping / querying an API)._

## Tools used

- Quarto (website + report rendering)
- Python (data wrangling, modeling, visualization)
- plotly (interactive visualizations)

## Acknowledgements

_TBD — course staff, data providers, collaborators._
